title: Aureline affected-install assessment record
description: Boundary schema for affected_install_assessment_record frozen in docs/security/advisory_identity_and_install_assessment_contract.md. One assessment answers whether a specific install lane and exact build identity is affected by one advisory, what mitigation state applies locally, how fresh mirrored/offline metadata is, what fixed build or compensating control exists, and what remains safe locally if the lane is disabled or narrowed. The record is designed for Help/About, update flows, advisory center cards, support exports, admin exports, and offline bundles; it avoids browser-only dependence and avoids leaking unrelated account/tenant identity. Raw hostnames, raw absolute paths, raw exploit payloads, raw signatures, raw package registry URLs, and raw secret material never cross this boundary; the record carries opaque refs, typed vocabularies, and reviewable summaries only. Adding a new enum value is additive-minor and bumps affected_install_assessment_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a governance decision.

affected_install_assessment_schema_versi.description: Integer schema version for this affected-install assessment export.

record_kind.description: Discriminator. Every record carries record_kind = affected_install_assessment_record.

opaque_id.description: Opaque stable id safe to log, export, and deep-link.

monotonic_timestamp.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp captured from a monotonic or bounded-skew source.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short human-readable sentence safe for UI, CLI, export, and support surfaces.

mirror_freshness_class.description: Frozen mirror-freshness vocabulary used by mirrored and offline profiles.

local_mitigation_state_class.description: Local mitigation state for the assessed install lane.

affected_subject_ref.description: Typed reference to an affected subject. Raw subject bodies never appear here.

install_profile_card_ref.description: Opaque ref into artifacts/release/install_topology_matrix.yaml for the assessed install-profile card.

exact_build_identity_ref.description: Opaque ref into schemas/build/exact_build_identity.schema.json for the assessed build identity.

affected_subjects.description: Typed subject refs binding the assessment to concrete artifact identities.

impacted_components.description: Optional grouping refs for UI and exports. These do not replace affected_subjects[] bindings.

fixed_exact_build_identity_ref.description: Exact build identity ref that fixes the advisory for this lane, when available.

compensating_control_note.description: Copy-safe note describing a compensating control when a fixed build is not yet available or not sufficient.

local_continuity_note.description: What still works safely if the affected lane is disabled or narrowed before a fix ships.

affected_install_assessment_record.description: Affected-install assessment record. One record per (advisory, install lane, build identity) evaluation.
